prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科组（含物理类）最低位次分别为707→782→663→569→609名，整体呈波动中前移趋势，近3年（2023–2025）在569–663名区间窄幅震荡，2025年基准位次约609名；该校在青海省理科组招生计划2021–2022年各17人，2023–2024年各19人，2025年增至20人；2026年计划仍为20人，与2025年持平，无扩招或缩招带来的竞争变化。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 北京邮电大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名近年稳步提升，2021年第54名→2025年第60名→2026年跃升至第50名，排名创历史新高，学校整体实力和声誉持续增强；该校在2021–2026年声誉评价文件中均未出现，无负面舆情事件；抖音热度排名第64位，评价为一般，短视频平台曝光量中等；2021–2025年投档异常文件中亦未出现，录取走势平稳，未出现断档或暴跌记录；信息与通信工程（A+）、计算机科学与技术（A）、电子科学与技术（A-）、网络空间安全（A-）、软件工程（A-）、光学工程（A-），共6个A-及以上学科，信息通信领域学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、通信工程、人工智能、网络空间安全等专业在AI与数字经济浪潮下持续高热；青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人，物理类按近年约64%占比估算约30864人，较2025年物理类30457人微增约1.3%，竞争略有加剧；北邮位于北京，对青海考生有较强地域吸引力；该校在青海省招生计划稳定在17–20人，占比较小，地域偏好对位次影响有限。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年基准位次609名、招生计划持平、软科排名跃升至第50名（吸引力增强）、青海省物理类考生微增（竞争略加剧）、信息通信类专业持续高热等因素，预计2026年最低录取位次较2025年小幅前移。预测最低位次约594名，区间505–683名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 计算机类（元班）（包含计算机科学与技术、网络空间安全、具身智能）
- 计算机类（包含计算机科学与技术、网络工程、数据科学与大数据技术）
- 通信工程（大类招生）（包含通信工程、电子信息工程、空间信息与数字技术）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 网络空间安全（大类招生）（包含网络空间安全、信息安全、密码科学与技术（AI安全与密码班））
- 电子信息类（包含电子科学与技术、电子信息科学与技术、光电信息科学与工程、集成电路设计与集成系统）
- 人工智能（大类招生）（包含信息工程、人工智能）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 暂无其他低分专业（北邮在青海省仅设6个招生专业，均为热门工科专业，无传统冷门专业）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 北邮在青海省理科组仅设6个招生专业，均为信息通信与计算机类热门专业，专业梯度较小。位次在预测区间505–683名内，建议以二档专业（网络空间安全、电子信息类、人工智能）为主攻方向，一档专业（计算机类元班、计算机类、通信工程）作为冲刺；位次明显优于区间上限（<505名）可重点冲刺一档王牌专业。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for the Science Group (including Physics Category) were 707 → 782 → 663 → 569 → 609, showing a fluctuating but generally advancing trend. In the recent three years (2023–2025), rankings fluctuated narrowly between 569 and 663, with a baseline ranking of approximately 609 in 2025. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai's Science Group was 17 students each in 2021–2022, 19 each in 2023–2024, and increased to 20 in 2025. The 2026 plan remains at 20, unchanged from 2025, with no competition changes due to expansion or contraction.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Beijing University of Posts and Telecommunications is a 211 Project and Double First-Class university. Its Soft Science Chinese University Rankings have steadily improved in recent years: 54th in 2021 → 60th in 2025 → jumping to 50th in 2026, a record high, indicating continuously enhanced overall strength and reputation. The university has not appeared in reputation evaluation documents from 2021 to 2026, with no negative public opinion incidents. Its Douyin popularity ranking is 64th, rated as average, with moderate exposure on short video platforms. It also did not appear in the 2021–2025 filing anomaly documents, showing stable admission trends without gaps or sharp drops. It has six A- or above disciplines: Information and Communication Engineering (A+), Computer Science and Technology (A), Electronic Science and Technology (A-), Cyberspace Security (A-), Software Engineering (A-), and Optical Engineering (A-), with top national strength in information and communication fields, strongly attracting high-scoring students.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Communication Engineering, Artificial Intelligence, and Cyberspace Security remain highly popular amid the AI and digital economy wave. In 2026, the total number of Qinghai's general college entrance exam takers is about 48,000, with Physics Category estimated at approximately 30,864 based on the recent 64% proportion, a slight increase of about 1.3% from 2025's 30,457, intensifying competition slightly. BUPT is located in Beijing, which has strong regional appeal for Qinghai students. The university's enrollment plan in Qinghai is stable at 17–20 students, a small proportion, so regional preference has limited impact on rankings.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the 2025 baseline ranking of 609, unchanged enrollment plan, Soft Science ranking jumping to 50th (enhanced appeal), slight increase in Qinghai's Physics Category examinees (slightly intensified competition), and sustained high popularity of information and communication majors, the minimum admission ranking in 2026 is expected to advance slightly compared to 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 594, with a range of 505–683.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Most Difficult to Enter)
- Computer Science (Yuan Class) (includes Computer Science and Technology, Cyberspace Security, Embodied Intelligence)
- Computer Science (includes Computer Science and Technology, Network Engineering, Data Science and Big Data Technology)
- Communication Engineering (Broad Enrollment) (includes Communication Engineering, Electronic Information Engineering, Spatial Information and Digital Technology).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Moderate)
- Cyberspace Security (Broad Enrollment) (includes Cyberspace Security, Information Security, Cryptography Science and Technology (AI Security and Cryptography Class))
- Electronic Information (includes Electronic Science and Technology, Electronic Information Science and Technology, Optoelectronic Information Science and Engineering, Integrated Circuit Design and Integrated Systems)
- Artificial Intelligence (Broad Enrollment) (includes Information Engineering, Artificial Intelligence).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- No other low-score majors currently (BUPT only offers 6 enrollment majors in Qinghai, all popular engineering majors, with no traditional low-demand majors).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: BUPT only offers 6 enrollment majors in Qinghai's Science Group, all popular information and communication and computer majors, with small major gradient. For rankings within the predicted range of 505–683, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors (Cyberspace Security, Electronic Information, Artificial Intelligence) as the main direction, with Tier 1 majors (Computer Science Yuan Class, Computer Science, Communication Engineering) as a stretch. For rankings significantly better than the upper limit (<505), prioritize Tier 1 flagship majors.
